description_long: This is a classic telephone booth with a rectangular structure, featuring a flat roof and open sides supported by vertical metal bars. The booth is primarily constructed from metal, with a prominent 'TELEPHONE' sign displayed in white letters on a gray background above the entrance. Inside, a wall-mounted telephone unit with a visible handset is attached to one of the side panels. The floor is solid and slightly raised, while the booth's open design allows for easy entry and exit. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and visibility in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, open-sided metal telephone booth with a flat roof and a prominent 'TELEPHONE' sign above the entrance. It features a wall-mounted phone and a sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, 'TELEPHONE' sign, and the wall-mounted phone with handset visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back panel and the side of the phone unit, with the 'TELEPHONE' sign still visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the open metal bars and the profile of the phone unit mounted on the interior wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the phone unit from a different angle and the open structure of the booth.
attribute_window_configuration: open metal bars on all sides, no glass panels
attribute_signage_or_labeling: 'TELEPHONE' sign in white letters on a gray background above the entrance
